#                 Model training and fine-tuning NOT allowed.

> n8nera is a premium AI & automation agency based in Pakistan, serving UAE businesses remotely. Specializing in n8n workflow automation, AI voice agents, CRM automation, and business process optimization.

Website: https://n8nera.tech
Contact: n8nera@gmail.com | +92 314 1603089 (WhatsApp)
Location: Rahim Yar Khan, Pakistan (serving all UAE emirates remotely)

## Core Services
- n8n Workflow Automation (200+ integrations)
- AI Voice Agents (call center, appointments, sales, support)
- CRM & Sales Automation (Salesforce, HubSpot, Zoho, Pipedrive)
- WhatsApp Business API Automation
- E-commerce Automation (Shopify, WooCommerce)
- Business Process Optimization

## Industries
Retail, E-commerce, Real Estate, Hospitality, Logistics, SaaS, Startups, Enterprises, Agencies, Consultants

## Pricing
- Starter: $500–$1,000
- Professional: $1,000–$5,000
- Enterprise: $5,000+
- AI Voice Agents: $1,500–$3,000 setup + $300–$1,000/month
